likely_control_endpoints.reason: form action or field names suggest PTU control

script_inferred_control_endpoints.reason: control.js uses /API/PTCmd for live PTU status updates.
index.js uses /API/PTCmd for PTU network and firmware values.
control.js sends PO through /API/PTCmd for pan position offsets.
control.js sends TO through /API/PTCmd for tilt position offsets.
control.js binds the Halt button to PTCmd('H').
index.js posts the serialized network form to /API/PTCmd when SendNetwork is clicked.
index.js posts 'ds' to /API/PTCmd when SaveNetwork is clicked.
index.js posts 'df&r' to /API/PTCmd when ResetNetwork is clicked.

validated_control_endpoints.reason: control.js binds the Halt button to PTCmd('H').
control.js sends PO through /API/PTCmd for pan position offsets.
control.js sends TO through /API/PTCmd for tilt position offsets.

notes: Discovery only records likely web control patterns.
Script-inferred PTU control endpoints come from concrete page scripts.
Validated endpoints are promoted only after a real execute path succeeds.
